reviews.review_description: This is not your average "VR walkthrough". A true interactive experience awaits you.

I was recommended this game and after I downloaded it it quickly became a hit! 

I enjoyed walking around and learning more about the tabernacle.          - Dad

"I liked being able to roam around by myself and be able to be in the tabernacle as if it were completely real."          - 12 year old daughter

"This app was fun because you get to walk around by yourself, and it's educational!"          - 10 year old son

"It was fun to explore around the tabernacle."        
                                                - 8 year old daughter

reviews.review_title: Really enjoyed. Shared w/a friend too!
reviews.review_description:
I explored this app with an old friend and he and I loved it. He even commented that though it was virtual, and an animated rendering, he felt it was a holy and educational experience - exploring the tabernacle.

I enjoyed it all. I wish more content could be added so it could be an expanding tour/experience.
One of the most engaging ways to teach about the Tabernacle and its symbolism

I recently purchased this VR app and found the content to be fascinating and well-made. However, as a Korean user, it’s difficult to fully engage with the app because it doesn’t support the Korean language. I would greatly appreciate it if you could consider adding Korean language support in a future update. At the very least, it would be helpful to implement AI-powered translation features so that non-English speakers can better understand and enjoy the experience. Thank you for your excellent work so far!

My kids were fascinated, I was educated, and we all came out knowing way more about the Ark, the altar, tent, and the meaning behind it all. 
The visuals are stunning, the narration is clear, and the spiritual insights are beautiful. 
If you’re a homeschool parent, church leader, or just curious about the Old Testament, this is an absolute must-try.
